forecast-period.text: Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 17.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 12:30pm to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southeasterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west in the late morning. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the eastern border, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 17.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Hawker, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 17.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm west of the ranges in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:40am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 19.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Woomera, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly in the middle of the day then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 19.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Woomera, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Coober Pedy in the afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southerly during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower east of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the evening. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. High chance of showers about the Gammon Ranges, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Leigh Creek in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers about the Gammon Ranges, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the afternoon. Winds northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
